author: zetsuto-kun ⭐ / CA4 (I15-16) TEMPO OUT NOW
title: Hiring freelance artists for TEMPO animation
content: 🎬 TEMPO is officially entering animation production! I'm looking for paid freelance artists to join the team. ✨ Layout Artist ✨ Key Animator ✨ In-between Animator ✨ Colorist ✨ Compositor Please send your Portfolio + Rates: sense2001.work@outlook.com

author: bee🐝🫧🩰🫟🍯
title: Hiring Illustrator for commercial sticker journal
content: [HIRING ILLUSTRATOR] 🎨 Halo! Aku lagi cari ilustrator untuk project commercial yang akan dijual sebagai produk sticker journal. Kalau tertarik, boleh drop: - Harga commission (commercial use) - Portfolio

author: Rive Animator
title: Hiring freelance Character Illustrators and Designers
content: We’re looking for freelance Character Illustrators and Character Designers for remote, project-based work. Help us turn AI-assisted character concepts into clean, high-quality final artwork. Send your portfolio, rates, and availability to: uiuxanimation@gmail.com
